title: Ofwat: workforce management information January 2026
text:
Ofwat publishes details about staff numbers and payroll costs for payroll and non-payroll staff on a monthly basis.

This data is also available on data.gov.uk:

Workforce management information – January 2026

Ofwat: workforce management information January 2026

MS Excel Spreadsheet
, 
49.9 KB

This file may not be suitable for users of assistive technology.

 Request an accessible format.
 

 

 
 If you use assistive technology (such as a screen reader) and need a version of this document in a more accessible format, please email 
webmaster@ofwat.gov.uk
. Please tell us what format you need. It will help us if you say what assistive technology you use.
description: Reports on departmental staff numbers and costs.
